response.overview: When an unprecedented activity triggers a chain reaction of global cataclysms, the world as we know shatters in a matter of hours. From the catastrophic flooding to the violent collapse of Europe's greatest monuments, billions are left fighting for their lives against the raw, unstoppable wrath of nature.
response.title: End of The World: 2026
